summary: Generative AI Engineer with 2+ years of experience.

education.degree: M.S. in Engineering Data Science and Artificial Intelligence
education.details: Focus on AI/ML, Advanced NLP, Deep Learning, and Large Language Models.

education.degree: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering (Specialization in Artificial Intelligence)
education.details: Specialized in AI with comprehensive coursework in Deep Learning, NLP, Computer Vision, Speech Processing, Reinforcement Learning, and Robotics. Published 2 conference papers.

experience.role: Advanced App Engineering Analyst - GenAI Specialist
details: Eliminated weeks of manual senior-engineer review by building a Change Impact Analysis pipeline using LLM-backed dependency graphs and RAG --- what previously required days of expert effort now completes in hours, achieving 89% coverage across codebases with 30,000+ files.

Architected multi-agent LLM workflows (LangChain + AutoGen) for automated Code Translation, Dependency Graph Generation, and User Story / Test Case Generation --- deployed on the client-facing GenWizard platform sold to enterprise clients across multiple industries.

Built semantic parsing layer supporting 15+ programming languages including legacy COBOL and VB.NET --- enabling cross-language dependency mapping at a scale and fidelity rarely achieved outside academic research.
Designed custom RAG pipelines with BERTopic topic modeling, sentence transformers, and Neo4j knowledge graphs; backed by multi-vector-store architecture (ChromaDB, Pinecone, PostgreSQL pgvector).
Mentored 30+ junior engineers on LLM application development and agentic frameworks; engineers went on to independently ship GenAI features across client projects.
Awarded Wall of Fame (Q4 FY24), Client Recognition Award, and Best Team Award for production delivery directly tied to client retention.
Developed deep learning framework for deepfake video detection achieving 96% accuracy.
Published in GCAT 2024. Conducted comprehensive literature review on AI forensics.
Conducted training sessions on Python, LangChain, AutoGen, and CrewAI for 30+ junior engineers.
Developed structured curriculum and provided hands-on mentorship.

projects.title: GPT-2 Style Small Language Model --- Built from Scratch
projects.description: Implemented a 100M+ parameter GPT-2 style LLM from scratch --- token embeddings, positional encodings, stacked transformer blocks with multi-head self-attention, and next-token prediction training loop --- demonstrating end-to-end understanding of modern LLM internals.

projects.title: Multi-Agent Deep RL for Autonomous Highway Merging
projects.description: Designed MARL system for autonomous on-ramp merging with human-driven vehicles; CNN policy network on raw pixels with Experience Replay and dual-network architecture for training stability.

projects.title: Speech Emotion Recognition
projects.description: CNN with MFCC / mel-spectrogram feature pipeline; 81% accuracy on RAVDESS --- applications in customer service automation and mental health monitoring.

projects.title: Detection of Real and Manipulated Videos using Transfer Learning
projects.description: Developed deep learning framework for deepfake detection achieving 96% accuracy on 6,500-video dataset. Published in GCAT October 2024.

projects.title: Indian Sign Language Generation from Live Audio/Text (Tamil)
projects.description: Real-time speech-to-sign translation system for Tamil-speaking hearing-impaired community. Published in ICACCS March 2023.

projects.title: Stock Price Prediction Using Deep Q-Learning
projects.description: Automated trading system learning optimal policies (Buy, Sell, Hold) using DQN with Experience Replay and dual-network architecture. Tested on Adani Enterprises stock data.

projects.title: Telugu News Article Classification
projects.description: Low-resource NLP solution with custom Word2Vec embeddings for Telugu corpus. Achieved 82% accuracy with Bi-LSTM model.

projects.title: Social Distance Monitoring System
projects.description: Real-time social distance violation detection using YOLOv3 with Euclidean distance computation and automated CCTV monitoring pipeline.

projects.title: Hand Gesture Controlled Robotic Arm
projects.description: Gesture-based human-machine interface with Master-Slave control system. Wireless robotic arm control using natural hand movements.

projects.title: Handwritten Character Recognition using HMM
projects.description: Machine learning model translating scanned handwritten documents to digital text. Achieved 99.9% accuracy using Viterbi algorithm.

projects.title: Real-Time Ball Tracking and Trajectory Analysis
projects.description: Automated object tracking for sports analytics with HSV color space conversion. Achieved 32+ FPS with 3D trajectory visualization.

projects.title: Number Writing Robotic Manipulator
projects.description: Robotic manipulator performing precision writing tasks using ROS and MoveIt! framework with custom URDF model.

projects.title: Operating Systems Chat Room Application
projects.description: Real-time messaging application implementing OS concepts: IPC, process synchronization, and mutex locks for race condition prevention.

projects.title: Predictive Text Generator using Markov Chains
projects.description: Predictive text application using Markov Chain theory for stochastic text generation. Evaluated trade-offs with LSTM-based approaches.

publications.title: Detection of Real and Manipulated Videos using Transfer Learning
publications.conference: Global Conference for Advancement in Technology (GCAT)
publications.description: Proposed deep learning framework combining transfer learning architectures with temporal models for deepfake detection.

publications.title: Indian Sign Language Generation from Live Audio/Text (Tamil)
publications.conference: International Conference on Advanced Computing and Communication Systems (ICACCS)
publications.description: Developed real-time speech-to-sign translation pipeline integrating NLP and computer vision for accessibility.

certifications.name: Building Transformer-Based Natural Language Processing Applications

awards.title: Wall of Fame Award (Q4 FY24)
awards.description: Exceptional contribution to GenAI platform development

awards.title: Client Recognition Award
awards.description: Successful delivery of production-grade GenAI solutions meeting client requirements

awards.description: Collaborative excellence in delivering complex AI projects

leadership.activities: Organized workshops and cultural events. Coordinated monthly photography competitions during COVID-19.
Participated in campus cleanliness drives and promoted organic farming awareness.

autofill.current_title: Advanced App Engineering Analyst - GenAI Specialist

common_answers.why_this_company: Drawn to this company because of its innovative work at the intersection of AI and real-world impact. The opportunity to contribute to cutting-edge intelligent systems aligns directly with 2+ years of hands-on experience building production-grade LLM and agentic AI solutions at Accenture.
common_answers.greatest_strength: The ability to bridge cutting-edge AI research with production engineering. Track record of translating complex LLM capabilities into deployable enterprise solutions — including achieving 89% technical analysis coverage and mentoring 30+ engineers at Accenture.
common_answers.greatest_weakness: Occasionally invest too much time perfecting solutions before shipping. Actively addressing this by setting milestone checkpoints and embracing iterative delivery — a practice that has improved project velocity significantly.
common_answers.five_year_plan: Aiming to grow into a senior AI architect or research engineer role, leading teams building next-generation agentic AI systems. Long-term goal is to contribute foundational work in multi-agent reasoning while deploying systems that meaningfully improve human productivity at scale.
common_answers.describe_yourself: Generative AI Engineer with 2+ years of experience designing and deploying production-grade LLM and agentic AI solutions. Passionate about solving real-world problems at scale through intelligent systems, with a strong foundation in NLP, RAG pipelines, and multi-agent architectures.
common_answers.biggest_achievement: Architected production-grade LLM solutions for reverse engineering SDLC workflows at Accenture, achieving 89% coverage in Technical Analysis with 9% efficiency improvement — recognized with the Wall of Fame Award Q4 FY24.
common_answers.team_or_solo: Equally effective working independently and collaboratively. At Accenture, led cross-functional GenAI platform development while also mentoring 30+ engineers — combining individual technical contributions with team leadership.
common_answers.handling_pressure: Approach high-pressure situations by breaking complex problems into structured milestones, prioritizing ruthlessly, and communicating proactively. This approach was key in delivering production GenAI systems on tight enterprise timelines at Accenture.
common_answers.remote_work_experience: Extensive experience working in distributed team environments. Comfortable with async communication, documentation-first workflows, and remote collaboration tools.
